scripts.bundle:check: mkdir -p /tmp/opencode/kmux-plugin-check && bun build kmux-status-server.ts --target bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --outfile /tmp/opencode/kmux-plugin-check/kmux-status-server-check.js && bun build kmux-status-tui.ts --target bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin/tui --outfile /tmp/opencode/kmux-plugin-check/kmux-status-tui-check.js && bun build kmux-select-session.ts --target bun --outfile /tmp/opencode/kmux-plugin-check/kmux-select-session-check.js
scripts.check: bun run fmt:check && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run bundle:check
